positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a soaring golden phoenix rising from stylized deep indigo and teal swirling mist. The phoenix silhouette should be highly detailed, majestic, and dynamic, depicted with flowing flames and feather textures. The background mist and elements should utilize negative space and strong geometric asymmetry, giving the entire composition a clean, modern emblem quality. Use a vibrant, high-contrast palette: brilliant gold, crimson, sapphire blue, and stark white accents. The style should be neo-tribal combined with sophisticated, modern vector art, perfect for a circular or square apparel print. Clean lines, strong outlines, and excellent visibility when printed on fabric. Centered composition.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, low contrast, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealistic, messy edges
